nasb.text: And every blow of the rod of punishment, Which the Lord will lay on him, Will be with the music of tambourines and lyres; And in battles, brandishing weapons, He will fight them.

esv.text: And every stroke of the appointed staff that the Lord lays on them will be to the sound of tambourines and lyres. Battling with brandished arm, he will fight with them.

cnv.text: 耶和華必把刑罰的杖加在他們身上， 每打一下， 都有擊鼓和彈琴的聲音； 耶和華在爭戰的時候，必揮動著手與他們爭戰。

ccb.text: 耶和华的刑杖每责打他们一下，祂的子民必击鼓弹琴。祂必在战场上挥手击打他们。

csbs.text: 耶和华施刑的杖每打他们一下， 人都会击鼓和弹琴； 打仗的时候，耶和华必挥手与他们争战。
